name: Semaphore Protocol v4
what_it_teaches: Anonymous group membership proofs via Groth16 over LeanIMT with Poseidon hashes; EdDSA identity on Baby Jubjub; nullifier = Poseidon(scope, secret); Phase 1 Powers of Tau ceremony reuse

name: World AgentKit
what_it_teaches: Binding agents to World IDs, separate on-chain registries

name: Iden3 Circuits
what_it_teaches: Signed ZK credentials with Merkle trees, nullifiers, on-chain verification

name: User Controlled Authorization Networks
what_it_teaches: Capability attenuation chains, subset enforcement, expiry narrowing, issuer signatures (cleartext, no ZK)

name: Biscuit
what_it_teaches: Capability chains with attenuation blocks, Datalog policies, revocation IDs (cleartext)

name: Tornado Cash Nova
what_it_teaches: Chained Poseidon commitments via ZK proofs with on-chain nullifiers

name: Tornado MerkleTreeWithHistory
what_it_teaches: Circular buffer of last N Merkle roots for proof staleness

name: Delegatable Anonymous Credentials, IACR ePrint 2008/428
what_it_teaches: Private delegation chains via randomizable credentials (pairing-based)

name: Aztec Connect DeFi Bridge
what_it_teaches: Batched multi-proof verification in a single tx with shared nonce/context

name: Minimal Anti-Collusion Infrastructure
what_it_teaches: EdDSA Poseidon verification in Circom for authenticated ZK messages

name: Mysten Labs zkLogin
what_it_teaches: ZK proof of OAuth identity for on-chain authentication

name: AnonCreds + BBS+ selective disclosure
what_it_teaches: Privacy-preserving credential attribute proofs (not delegation chains)

name: Rate-Limiting Nullifier
what_it_teaches: Per-epoch nullifiers for rate limiting in anonymous systems

name: Indicio ProvenAI
what_it_teaches: W3C Verifiable Credentials for AI agents with operator attestation and capability claims (no ZK privacy)
